"'''Rendezvous at Ord Mantell'''" is an adventure for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]], written by [[Andy Collins]]. It was first published in [[Star Wars Gamer 1|''Star Wars Gamer #1'']]. An updated version that reflected the revised game rules was published on Wizards of the Coast's website in May [[2002]].

{{Game-stub}}
